title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a graphical interface for the Hermes Agent platform that enables session management, skill toggling, messaging integrations across multiple platforms, scheduled task creation via cron, and multi-agent workflow visualization. It supports model selection across providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and OpenRouter.
